message:
ci: run on tags and manual dispatch

Add tag trigger and workflow_dispatch so releases can get a CI run and can be rerun manually.

files.patch:
@@ -3,8 +3,11 @@ name: CI
 on:
   push:
     branches: [ main, develop ]
+    tags:
+      - "*"
   pull_request:
     branches: [ main ]
+  workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
   test:
@@ -63,4 +66,4 @@ jobs:
     - name: Build Example
       run: |
         cd Example
-        swift build -v
\ No newline at end of file
+        swift build -v

@@ -20,4 +20,4 @@ Demark uses SemVer tags (`1.0.1`) and GitHub Releases.
 
 ## Notes
 
-- CI currently runs on branch pushes/PRs (see `.github/workflows/ci.yml`), not on tags.
+- CI runs on branch pushes/PRs and tags (see `.github/workflows/ci.yml`).
